title: Tantalum Capacitors Market Size to Grow USD 2.68 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global tantalum capacitors market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.15% from 2025 to 2035, driven by demand for miniaturized electronics, AI servers, 5G infrastructure, and electric vehicles. The U.S. market is projected to reach $480M by 2035, while Europe's market is expected to hit $0.66B. Surface mount technology and polymer tantalum types are experiencing the fastest growth, with the automotive segment leading expansion at 10.68% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Vishay launched the TSM3 series surface-mount cermet trimmers in January 2025, showing active product development and positioning in the fast-growing surface mount technology segment for industrial and telecom applications.
Identified as a major market player but no specific recent developments or strategic initiatives highlighted in the article.
Listed among leading market players but no specific recent developments or product announcements mentioned in the article.

title: Why QuantumScape Stock Jumped Again Today
author: Howard Smith
description: QuantumScape announced a new partnership with electronics manufacturer Murata to advance high-volume production of ceramic separators for solid-state lithium-metal batteries, boosting investor confidence in the company's EV battery technology.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock has more than doubled in the last month, secured partnerships with Corning and Murata, making progress towards commercializing innovative battery technology
Mentioned as a collaborative partner in developing ceramic separators for battery technology

title: Where Will QuantumScape Stock Be in 1 Year?
author: Leo Sun
description: QuantumScape, a solid-state battery developer, is a speculative stock with potential in the EV battery market. Despite no current revenue and significant losses, the company has pivoted to a licensing model and is developing advanced battery technology with Volkswagen, with potential for future growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The stock shows potential with technological advancements and a strategic pivot to licensing, but remains high-risk due to lack of revenue, ongoing losses, and uncertain commercialization timeline
Actively partnering with QuantumScape in battery technology development through its PowerCo division, indicating strategic interest in innovative battery solutions

title: Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors Market Trends, Opportunities, and Forecasts, 2020-2030: Increasing Demand Driven by Rapid Growth in Consumer Electronics and Automotive Sectors
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The aluminum electrolytic capacitors market is experiencing strong growth driven by rising demand in the consumer electronics and automotive sectors, particularly for electric vehicles and ADAS technologies. However, the market faces challenges from fluctuating raw material prices and supply chain disruptions.

title: Smart Materials Market Size is Poised to Grow with CAGR of 13.5% by 2031 | SkyQuest Technology
author: Globe Newswire
description: The smart materials market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 13.5% to reach $218.98 billion by 2031, driven by increasing demand for advanced materials and a focus on sustainability. The market is dominated by the actuators & motors segment and is expected to see the fastest growth in the shape memory materials segment.
